title: Steel Ash
description: This is a mod that adds a variety of things on the theme of ash and lasers + many achievements, dungeons and a new dimension
body:
Steel Ash adds more interesting things to your game: A new dimension "Laser World", in which you can find 2/3 of new biomes, laser hills and laser plains. In the overworld you can find Laser Hills and Ash Landscapes. This mod will also add a new ore, cobalt. Cobalt can be used to make new tools and armor. This MRD also adds new dungeons such as a deserted library or a destroyed portal with a cobalt block instead of a gold one. Also, one of the main mechanics of the mod is the creation of an ash-steel ingot. To do this, you need to fry an iron ingot over a fire and then melt it down. There are many more interesting things in fashion!

The mod was created using MCreator
